title: Better Crossbow Pack (CIT)
description: This pack changes the Crossbow based on Type of Projectile
body:
## This pack changes the texture of the Crossbow According to the Type of Projectile & also Works with Enchantments
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

**Note: This pack is not fully completed planing to add all arrows to display & maybe add other enchantments too!!**

![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc45b68986916812c7fce1cd7a61c7a8b618a6b1.png)

![In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bf95d7c63c06a8e532ea32779abfaaec1667583.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
